programmes.show_description: Sergeant Rob Marks hunts down a man with a gun, a novice driver causes a three-car crash and a busy shopping plaza is the scene of a daylight shooting.
Steve finds himself up the creak without a paddle on a desert island delivery, Yogi runs out of road, and two concrete specialists head off the map and into trouble.
Dan tackles a cherry picker stuck in a boggy bridleway. In Worcestershire, Kieran faces a challenging uphill battle to recover a stranded farm vehicle. Will they find a way out?
Daniel and Dean strip a burnt-out horse box for recovery but one wrong move could bring the whole thing crashing down. Mouse races to clear a lorry without a back wheel on the A66.
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.

Your one-stop-shop for all things cruise; bringing you the hottest destinations, ground-breaking ships and the latest deals to ensure your next cruise holiday is your greatest one!
In an episode focusing on young drivers, a silver Astra leads Dan on a 100mph chase down before U-turning into oncoming traffic.
There is a hair-raising pursuit through the market town of Ripley which sees a driver mounting pavements.
A drink driver suffers a spectacular crash, a van loses control during a chase and the helicopter comes in handy during a manhunt.
Western with Glenn Ford. A town sheriff with a reputation as a legendary gunfighter is called to a showdown with a younger gunslinger and tries to talk him out of the duel. (1967)

Craig's brother Brent borrows a logging machine, leading to a risky mountainside recovery; veteran log hauler Dan Millar battles rough roads and torn up tires to make it to the mill.
In an episode focusing on shoplifters, Julian pursues the users of a getaway car that crashed, and James arrests the same man twice.
Tonight's episode kicks off with a high-speed pursuit of an April fool driving a Vauxhall Meriva. A direct hit from Dan's X5 isn't enough to bring the runaway to a stop.
Three teenagers allegedly threaten a shopkeeper with a gun. The firearms team flood the area and it's not long before Paul and Lewis catch sight of a trio who fit the bill.
The Quarter Finals. Conclusion of the heavyweight clash between four-time World Champions Mark Selby and John Higgins for a place in the Semi Finals. Live from Manchester Central.
A deputy tries to level with a man who's struggled with addiction for a decade. Security guards at an aquarium warn officers about a man with a gun.
After leading police on a slow pursuit, a sharply-dressed driver has a heated talk with another deputy. In spite of her tears, police unravel a woman's lies one-by-one.
The agents investigate a ministry led by a man whose son seems to possess the power to heal - and to kill - with the touch of his hand.
A 911 call about stolen gas leads Lieutenant Stacey to the local school, Patrolman Gibson is called to a suspected carjacking, and Officer Rugel finds marijuana.
Jonny Rayner faces a seemingly impossible choice - take on a crocodile-infested river at 2am or wait until dawn and further delay his critical run.
Crews face a burnt-out horse box, a stranded lorry on the A66, and a risky orange-laden trailer lift in the Midlands - all demanding precision, teamwork, and nerves of steel.
Reality series following the people who take on super-sized transport jobs. The Beast from the East descends, bringing some of the country's busiest roads to a standstill.

Storms bring travel chaos to the roads. Inspector Anton is bracing the weather as he attends a major incident where a roof has blown off and collapsed.
An urgent call leads to a multivehicle pursuit to rescue a child. PC Ian tracks down the suspect on the M6, but is the driver alone?
Inspector Anton is tailing a dangerously erratic driver in a white van. As he stops him, the driver refuses to cooperate and the situation quickly escalates.
A Tactical Pursuit and Containment (TPAC) operation is in full swing as a vehicle linked to drug dealing is on the run and evading police.
The night shift police of the Gloucestershire Constabulary deal with multiple car thefts, drunken misbehaviour in Cheltenham town centre, and a boy who has run off into the night...
A traffic stop turns dangerous when a driver takes off with a deputy halfway inside the vehicle. Recent changes in the law and a forthright attitude help a man avoid jail time.
A man in between jobs takes up a sketchy method of earning money. Deputies strongly question the legitimacy of a man's work van.
Mulder and Scully track a wolf-like creature linked to Native American legend.
